content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Xingchen took the Eternal Fire Vine and placed it into his Eternal Dao Seed.

Rumble!!!!

The Eternal Fire Vine quickly refined his Eternal Dao Seed, and this effect was much better than that of the Evil Vine.

Now, he has two treasures that can refine the Eternal Dao Seed, and if the Evil Punishment Vine is one, then the Eternal Fire Vine is ten, which is a tenfold increase in effect!

At Ye Tian's suggestion, Ye Xingchen only used the Eternal Fire Vine to refine and improve the Eternal Dao Seed, and the Evil Punishment Vine was given to his mother Xiao Yue, so that Xiao Yue's Eternal Dao Seed could be improved faster.

......

"It's a pity that they can't quickly refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, and they don't have a clone, if they stay in the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss all the time, it must be very troublesome, and it is easy to expose their identities. It wouldn't be great if I really let the Outer Eternal Realm Divine Realm know that I could refine the Eternal Demon Pillar!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that even the solidified Eternal Dao Seed of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm would not be able to withstand the power of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and would still be transformed into a demon seed.

After all, after the Eternal Dao seed is solidified, it is just not easy to be demonized, which does not mean that it is impossible to be demonized.

Therefore, this is also the reason why many Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, even if they know that there is an Eternal Demon Pillar here, they do not take it.

And once the news that Ye Tian was not afraid of the Eternal Demon Pillar spread, the secret of his Perfect Eternal Dao Seed would also be discovered, and it would be a big trouble.

"It would be nice if we could take away the Eternal Pillar!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But now he is only in preliminary control of the Eternal Demon Pillar, and there is no way to take the Eternal Demon Pillar away from the No. 1 Demon Seed Abyss.

However, he firmly believed that if he continued to refine like this, he would definitely be able to take the Eternal Demon Pillar away.

In that case, the Eternal Pillar will belong to him completely, and no one knows who the Eternal Pillar will fall into.

Only then can he let his relatives slowly refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, and use the Eternal Demon Pillar to refine the Eternal Dao Seed.

......

Core of the Eternal Fire.

"Didn't find a second Eternal Fire Vine, but this thing did!"

Ye Tian was holding a crimson crystal in his hand, which contained countless special auras, and this aura made his Eternal Dao Species a little happier.

"Chiyan Dao Jing!"

This treasure helps to help the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm to give birth to realm spirits.

The eternal Dao species of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm have all been solidified, and after solidification, they can also be improved, and if they are raised to a certain extent, they can give birth to the Realm Spirit, and once they are successfully conceived, their strength will skyrocket.

But to conceive a world spirit, it is not something that can be conceived if you want to conceive, you need the assistance of some treasures to have a certain success rate.

And Chiyan Daojing is one of them.

Chiyan Dao Crystal is not of much help to Ye Tian, he doesn't need this thing now, besides, he has a better Eternal Realm Spirit Tree, if he continues to cultivate, he can harvest the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit in the future.

The Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit can far surpass the Chiyan Dao Crystal, and an Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit can almost 100% allow an Eternal Realm God Realm to give birth to a Realm Spirit.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't need this thing of Chiyan Dao Crystal.

"You can trade it with it, I wonder if you can trade it for the Eternal Fire Vine?"

Ye Tian pondered.

Other Eternal Realm God Realms should not need the Eternal Fire Vine, if he uses the Red Flame Dao Crystal to trade the Eternal Fire Vine, if some forces have this thing, there is a high probability that they will be willing to trade.

......

Lone Star Realm Alliance.

Ye Tian was asking which force had the Eternal Fire Vine, but this kind of information was not easy to obtain.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian used a force, the Heavenly Star Pavilion, to disseminate trading information, and was willing to trade the Red Flame Dao Crystal for the Eternal Fire Vine or a treasure similar to the Eternal Fire Vine.

After that, he slowly waited for the information from the Heavenly Star Pavilion.

If a power is willing to trade with him, he will do it.

Time passed slowly.

this day.

The Heavenly Star Pavilion sent a message that there was a force willing to trade with him.

【North Longze】

However, that Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse was not here, but was wandering around the Realm God Realm, and he hadn't come back for a long time.

Therefore, in recent years, the power of Beilongze has weakened a little.

And Ye Tian also has some understanding of this force, and this force has a bad reputation.

"Regardless of their reputation, if they are willing to trade, they will trade, as long as they obtain the treasure of the Eternal Fire Vine. "

So, Ye Tian made an appointment with the force of Beilongze, the city of Tianxing City, to discuss and negotiate transactions.......

Soon.

Ye Tian met with a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse in Northern Longze, the Dao Master of Blood Ze.

As soon as they met, the Blood Ze Dao Lord asked urgently, "Ye Tian Guo Lord, do you really have the Chiyan Dao Crystal in your hand?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He took out the Chiyan Dao Crystal, which made the Blood Ze Dao Lord excited.

This is a good thing, although he can't use it, but the Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse dedicated to Beilongze is also very good, maybe he will be rewarded.

No matter how bad it is, it's cost-effective to take it out and trade it for other treasures!

And Ye Tianyao's Eternal Fire Vine, this kind of item has no value at all.

So, he agreed to a deal.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, our Beilongze just happens to have another Eternal Fire Vine, then let's trade it!"

The Blood Ze Dao Lord took out the Eternal Fire Vine, which was sealed with a special formation, otherwise it would affect the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

Even a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, if they are affected by the Eternal Fire Vine, they will be transformed into demon seeds.

Therefore, the Blood Ze Dao Master is also cautious.

Ye Tian directly traded with the Blood Ze Dao Master, and the two sides exchanged treasures, and they were all happy.

"Blood Ze Dao Master, farewell!"

Ye Tian said.

Then, Ye Tian left here, preparing to return to the Endless Realm with this Eternal Fire Vine, and give this Eternal Fire Vine to his wife Xiao Yue.

However.

As soon as he was some distance away from the 5.4 Lone Star Realm Alliance, figures appeared in the void, encircling him.

"Lord Ye Tianguo, why are you in such a hurry?"

As soon as the words fell.

The Blood Ze Dao Lord appeared.

And several other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses were also subordinate to Beilongze.

"The six half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses of Beilongze!"

Ye Tian frowned and asked, "Blood Ze Dao Master, what do you mean by this?"

The Blood Ze Dao Lord said coldly: "It's not interesting, I'm curious, you are actually willing to trade that Chiyan Dao Crystal to trade such a chicken thing as the Eternal Fire Vine, don't tell me that you have a lot of money, I guess you must have a way to restrain the side effects of the Eternal Fire Vine and be able to use it." If you say that, we'll let you go. "。
